commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 8:11 And Solomon brought up the daughter of Pharaoh out of the city of David unto the house that he had built for her: for he said, My wife shall not dwell in the house of David king of Israel, because the places are holy, to which the ark of the LORD has come. It was deemed improper for a pagan woman to reside in the same place. (Calmet) She had perhaps pretended, at first, to be converted, but had lately given some signs of relapse. (Salien) Solomon was as yet far from communicating with infidels. (Worthington).
